features: [Exquisite Hair Accessories] Children's headband with large bow and lace design, exquisite workmanship, light weight, soft and comfortable to wear, will not leave traces on your child's head, can make your baby more lovely and charming.
[Thoughtful Design] The baby hairband comes with elasticity to fit children's head better, suitable for girls with 36-42cm head circumference, easy to use and won't burden your baby's head.

[Affordable Set] One set contains 3 different styles of lace hairbands, you can match different hairbands according to your child's dressing style, making your child look like a little princess, cute and elegant.

[Widely Used] The bow headband is suitable for newborn babies or girls aged 0-1 years old, and can be used to take photos to leave a beautiful moment and record your child's growth. Perfect for special occasions such as full moon gifts, birthday parties and photography.

[Ideal Gift] The lace girl hairband is cute and stylish, ideal as a gift for your girl on birthdays, baby gifts, Christmas, children's day and other festivals to make your girl more elegant and beautiful.
description: Product Description Features: The baby hairband is made of lace, very breathable and comfortable, even in the hot summer, you will not feel stuffy. The elastic design will not hurt the girl's hair and skin and will not leave any marks. Exquisite children's hair accessories come with bow and floral pattern design, when your baby wears it, it will become the focus of everywhere. Perfect for Christmas, birthday, Xmas, party or other special time or festivals to wear and use. Specification: -Material: lace -Colour: White -Size: as shown in the picture Package Included: 3* baby girl hair bands Attention: -Hairbands are recommended to be hand washed as they are made of lace, machine washing is not recommended. -Head size may vary according to baby's growth. It is recommended to measure your baby's head circumference before purchase.
